feed.title: Chengdu Shengnuo Biopharm Co., Ltd
feed.subtitle:
Shengnuo products - polypeptide, cosmetology peptide, shengnuo biological polypeptide drug Engineering Technology Research Center
Shengnuo, shengnuo biology, shengnuo technology, Chengdu shengnuo, polypeptide, beauty peptide, polypeptide medicine
We are mainly engaged in the research of peptide, peptide medicine and beauty peptide. Our 0 defect has passed the FDA certification, and now we have become the first-class professional peptide medicine and product development, technology transfer, technical service and peptide medicine industrial park of large-scale production and export in China
